query:
SELECT 
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.detail')) as detail,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.type')) as type_field,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.payment_detail')) as payment_detail,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365'
GROUP BY detail, type_field, payment_detail
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15;
